description: The ExpenseTrackerApp project is open in Android Studio. The app has three Activities (MainActivity, AddExpenseActivity, SettingsActivity) that each manually instantiate their dependencies: CurrencyService, ExpenseRepository, NotificationService, and SettingsManager. This manual wiring causes duplicated initialization code across the activities and makes the app untestable. Refactor the dependency injection using Dagger Hilt by configuring the project dependencies, setting up the Hilt application class (ExpenseApp), creating a Hilt module (AppModule) to provide the required services, and implementing field injection in all three activities. Login credentials: user 'ga', password 'password123'. Ensure the project compiles successfully after the refactor.
